description: Emergence recipes — authored templates that ripen from practice (co-activation ledger). The engine mints from these; the model never freeforms a combo. Three tiers: 'branch' grows an owned ability's tree, 'combo' braids two owned abilities into a discovery, 'novel' is the rare wholly-new unlock (gated hardest). notFor and cost lines carry the same honesty bar as the ability catalog.

recipes.name: Resonant Sight
recipes.description: Light and vibration read together: see a thing by how it rings and refracts at once. Hidden seams, hollow places, and stress-signatures show themselves — what a surface conceals is betrayed by how it answers the braided field.
recipes.notFor: Reading intent or thought (only structure and material); working through the gray water, which returns silence to both senses; seeing what has no resonance and casts no light.
recipes.narrationHints: The two techniques stop being two — light held to a note until the object confesses its inside. Warm where it's whole, wrong where it's been touched.
recipes.discoveredBlurb: Prism Sight and Sonic Resonance have braided enough times that they've fused: the eye now hears and the ear now sees.

recipes.name: Warden's Chord
recipes.description: Brace and vibration sung as one held chord: stabilize a failing structure — a bridge, a shaft, a wall mid-collapse — long enough for people to cross or clear. Buys minutes, not permanence.
recipes.notFor: Repairing (only holding); holding against a force that grows; anything you can't touch or stand within reach of.
recipes.narrationHints: A note you hold in your teeth and your knees both. The stone agrees to wait.
recipes.discoveredBlurb: Anchoring and resonance have run together enough to become a single sustained act.

recipes.name: True Ward
recipes.description: A ward that doesn't just bar but reports: anything crossing it is seen truly as it passes — form, intent-shape, whether it's what it claims. A tripwire that also names the thing that trips it.
recipes.notFor: Stopping what it reveals (it sees, it doesn't hold); reading through deliberate Precursor masking; covering more than a threshold-sized span.
recipes.narrationHints: The ward hums and the hum has eyes. Nothing passes unread.
recipes.discoveredBlurb: Sight and ward have fused — the boundary now perceives what meets it.

branchTemplates.name: Deep Read
branchTemplates.grants: A specialization branch: with time and stillness, read an object's layered history in light — not just what it is, but the order of what happened to it.
branchTemplates.cannot: Needs minutes and quiet; a hurried or hostile scene forecloses it; history older than the material itself is silent.
branchTemplates.narrationHints: The spectrum stops being a snapshot and becomes a sequence — a stratigraphy of light.
